---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new public API, behaviour, or non-trivial change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what capability does it unlock?
What's the current workaround, if any?

## Proposed change

Describe the proposed API or behaviour change. Sketches of new types,
function signatures, or example call sites are welcome.

## Scope and non-goals

What's explicitly in scope; what's deliberately out. Keep the crate's
scope in mind (game-playing core only — no bots, networking, clocks,
or server code).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why this one is preferred.

## Upstream compatibility

If the change concerns RBC rules, how does it relate to the upstream
Python [`reconchess`](https://github.com/reconnaissanceblindchess/reconchess)
behaviour? Parity changes need a rationale; behavioural extensions
beyond upstream should be opt-in or clearly versioned.
